wiki.summary: "CRANK" is a song by American singer-songwriter Slayyyter, released on October 24th, 2025. It is the fifth track and third single from her third studio album, "WOR$T GIRL IN AMERICA". On November 19th, 2024, Slayyyter posted a snippet of her recording a song. It was later revealed to be an early version of this song. On May 24th, 2025, during a Tumblr Q&A, someone asked what illicit substance her new era is. She responded with 'CRANK' teasing the song. Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: "CRANK" is a song by American singer-songwriter Slayyyter, released on October 24th, 2025. It is the fifth track and third single from her third studio album, "WOR$T GIRL IN AMERICA". On November 19th, 2024, Slayyyter posted a snippet of her recording a song. It was later revealed to be an early version of this song. On May 24th, 2025, during a Tumblr Q&A, someone asked what illicit substance her new era is. She responded with 'CRANK' teasing the song. An extended snippet of the song was played at the BEAT UP CHANEL$ listening party on August 8th, 2025. On October 20th, 2025, Slayyyter revealed the cover art and release date: "CRANK. OUT FRIDAY." It was released on streaming services on October 24th, 2025, featuring a music video. Read more on Last.fm.
